name: Randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled trial of fecal microbiota transplantation from young physically active donors to promote resilient aging: clinical trial protocol (ARMOR study)
summary: A 2026 BMC Geriatrics protocol for a randomized trial of oral FMT capsules from young physically active donors in community-dwelling older adults, with safety, functional autonomy, strength, metabolic, microbiome, cognition, and psychological outcomes.
